<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 08 column H. The path straight ahead from B toward H is blocked later by lava in row 02 column G, so I need to move downward into the open area and work around the lava columns. The safest immediate move is to go forward from B to C, which is a free cell and keeps me progressing toward the open route.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 02 column C facing right. Moving forward would take me to row 02 column D, which is safe. This keeps me progressing along the top open corridor toward the right side of the map, where I can later navigate down toward the goal while avoiding the lava at G.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing right. The cell in front, row 02 column E, is safe, and continuing right along the top corridor is the best option because the lava at G blocks the direct path, so I need to keep moving toward the open right side before going down.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column E facing right. The next cell row 02 column F is safe, so I should continue forward along the top corridor to get closer to the right-side opening above the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE

I am at row 02 column F facing right. The cell in front, row 02 column G, is lava, so I should not move forward. To continue toward the goal, I need to turn downward to find a safe path around the lava barrier.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

GIRA_HORARIO
